creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
There appear to be plist issues and a missing dependency:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: /usr/local/lib/libgtksourceview-5.so.0.0.0 is linked to /usr/local/lib/libfontconfig.so.1 from x11-fonts/fontconfig but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libfontconfig.so:x11-fonts/fontconfig
Warning: you might not need LIB_DEPENDS on libatk-1.0.so
Warning: you might not need LIB_DEPENDS on libharfbuzz.so
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%-5/language-specs/blueprint.lang
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%-5/language-specs/elixir.lang
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%-5/language-specs/groff.lang
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%-5/language-specs/nix.lang
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%-5/language-specs/reasonml.lang
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%-5/language-specs/todotxt.lang
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%-5/language-specs/twig.lang
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%-5/language-specs/wren.lang
Error: Orphaned: share/locale/ab/LC_MESSAGES/gtksourceview-5.mo
Error: Orphaned: share/locale/ie/LC_MESSAGES/gtksourceview-5.mo
Error: Orphaned: share/locale/ka/LC_MESSAGES/gtksourceview-5.mo
Error: Orphaned: share/locale/kab/LC_MESSAGES/gtksourceview-5.mo
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.

Please check and resubmit.
